author: Sophie John
title: Commission VTuber artist/rigger
content: I am looking to commission a talented artist/rigger to bring my VTuber design to life. #VTuber #ENVtuber #VTuberAssets #Live2D #Live2DCommissions #VTuberDesign #VtuberUprising #LookingForArtist

author: Dana Bayes
title: Hiring artist for literary project
content: Looking for an artist for a literary project I’m finishing. Monetary compensation will be given. I wanted to extend the offer to any local artists before posting on indeed. If interested please let me know.

author: Alex Lim
title: Looking for artist/s to draw my foxyyy
content: Looking for artist/s to draw my foxyyy i made this new oc and i really love him and would like to commission artist/s for a pfp / icon worthy HAHAHAHAH DETS: ( P300 per artwork max ... budget : 300 petot — 400 robex ... MOP: strictly g-cash only..
